nodes.label: AI for low-risk mundane tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for high-risk or complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I typically only use AI to automate any sort of low-risk mundane task

nodes.label: AI for code skeletons vs functional code
nodes.grounding_span: writing skeletons for code but not any actual functional code itself

nodes.label: Time efficiency of AI use
nodes.label_negative: Time cost of verifying AI output
nodes.grounding_span: I find it to be more time efficient for myself to write the code

nodes.label: Trust in AI output
nodes.grounding_span: I do not possess the level of trust required to insert this into my programs

nodes.label: AI understanding of user goal
nodes.grounding_span: overly frustrated when the AI cannot understand my request

nodes.label: AI for well-defined vs creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: something that is not a well defined cookie cutter problem

nodes.label: Healthy skepticism vs over-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: a healthy skepticism but openness to using it

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: more time efficient for myself to write the code

nodes.label: Control and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: fully understand what is happening so if there is a problem debugging will be much easier

nodes.label: Reliability and correctness
nodes.grounding_span: limit any possibility it is done incorrectly

nodes.label: Effective communication
nodes.grounding_span: overly frustrated when the AI cannot understand my request

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for mundane tasks

nodes.label: Frustration with AI misunderstanding
nodes.grounding_span: overly frustrated when the AI cannot understand my request

nodes.label: Openness to future AI use
nodes.grounding_span: If AI were to improve I would feel more confident using it for more involved tasks

nodes.label: Step-by-step collaborative decomposition
nodes.grounding_span: I will collaborate and help it walk through the process one part at a time

nodes.label: Pragmatic time-cost balancing
nodes.grounding_span: It's more of just a balance of time
